zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronella Chudleigh於大約1483年出生在英國戴文艾希頓時，她的父親Sir James Chudleigh41歲，母親Margaret Stourton30歲。她於1502年與Anthony Pollard在英國英格蘭戴文霍武德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1552年在英國戴文霍武德享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Petronella Chudleigh于大约1483年出生在英国戴文艾希頓时，她的父亲Sir James Chudleigh41岁，母亲Margaret Stourton30岁。她于1502年与Anthony Pollard在英国英格兰戴文霍武德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1552年在英国戴文霍武德享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chudleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Chudley
meanings: English: locative name from Chudleigh in Devon.

nameMeanings.name: Petronella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Fedele, Francesco, Marco, Salvatore, Vito.
Italian (southern): from Petronella, a feminine pet form of Petrone or Petronio .

variants.name: Petrone
meanings: From Latin Petronilla, originally a feminine diminutive of the Roman family name Petronius (of uncertain derivation). The name Petronilla was borne by a 1st-century martyr, and early in the Christian era came to be connected with Peter , so that in many legends surrounding her she is described as a companion or even the daughter of St Peter .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Petronella Chudleigh was born about 1483, in Ashton, Devon, England, her father, Sir James Chudleigh, was 41 and her mother, Margaret Stourton, was 30. She married Anthony Pollard in 1502, in Horwood, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died in 1552, in Horwood, Devon, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Petronella Chudleigh est née environ 1483, à Ashton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Chudleigh, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stourton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Anthony Pollard en 1502, à Horwood, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1552, à Horwood, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Petronella Chudleigh um 1483 in Ashton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Chudleigh 41 und ihre Mutter Margaret Stourton 30. Sie hat 1502 in Horwood, Devon, England, United Kingdom Anthony Pollard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1552 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Horwood, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Petronella Chudleigh è nata il circa 1483 nel Ashton, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir James Chudleigh, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Margaret Stourton, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Anthony Pollard nel 1502, nel Horwood, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1552, nel Horwood, Devon, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Petronella Chudleighが約1483年にイギリスデボンアシュトンで生まれた時，父Sir James Chudleighは41歳，母Margaret Stourtonは30歳であった。1502年にイギリスイギリスデボンホールウッドでAnthony Pollardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1552年にイギリスデボンホールウッドで70歳で死去した。

ko.Waye by Ashburton, Devon, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 웨이 비 애스h버턴
ko.Waye by Ashburton, Devon, England, Unite: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 웨이 비 애스h버턴
ko.lifeSummary: Petronella Chudleigh(이)가 대략 1483년 영국 데폰 애슈턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Chudleigh(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stourton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 호우드에서 Anthony Pollard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1552년 영국 데폰 호우드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Petronella Chudleigh nasceu aproximadamente 1483, em Ashton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James Chudleigh, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stourton, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Anthony Pollard em 1502, em Horwood, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1552, em Horwood, Devon, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronella Chudleigh родилась около 1483 г. в местности аштон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir James Chudleigh было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stourton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anthony Pollard в 1502 г. в местности хаурвуд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1552 г. в местности хаурвуд, девон, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

Se casó con Anthony Pollard en 1502, en Horwood, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió en 1552, en Horwood, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
